title: 2024年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検準2級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを、放送される1, 2, 3の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to come to my house for dinner tomorrow, Laura?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'd love to. Should I bring anything?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, that's fine. Just come over around six o'clock.

questions.explanation: 6時頃来てと言われ、行くと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Just come over around six o'clock
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「料理してない」→関係ない。選択肢2「行きます」→正解。選択肢3「あなたも行くべき」→招待された側。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Carol. Where are you going?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm going to the library to finish my history project for Professor Hamilton's class.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: History project―oh no! I forgot about that!

choices: Well, I like Professor Hamilton, too.
Well, it needs to be finished by tomorrow.
questions.explanation: 忘れていたと言っている相手に、明日までに終わらせる必要があると教えるのが自然です。
highlights: I forgot about that
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「歴史を取ってない」→同じクラス。選択肢2「先生が好き」→課題の話。選択肢3「明日までに終わらせる必要」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Welcome to the Arlington Hotel. Do you have a reservation?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I don't, but I was hoping to get a room for the night.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm sorry, but all of our rooms are fully booked.

choices: I see. I'll drive there, then.
I see. I'll have a single room, then.
I see. I'll try somewhere else, then.
questions.explanation: 満室と言われ、他のところを探すと答えるのが自然です。
highlights: all of our rooms are fully booked
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「車で行く」→ホテルにいる。選択肢2「シングルルーム」→満室。選択肢3「他を探す」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hey, Grandpa, it's been a while since I called. I've been busy with schoolwork.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I understand, Lisa. You should focus on your studies.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks. I'll visit you after my final exams.

questions.explanation: 期末試験の後に会いに行くと言われ、嬉しいと答えるのが自然です。
highlights: I'll visit you after my final exams
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「成績がいい」→訪問の話。選択肢2「それは素晴らしい」→正解。選択肢3「もっと電話して」→訪問の返事。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hey Coach, will we have basketball practice after school today?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, we'll be working on passing skills today.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's good. I'm looking forward to the practice.

choices: Well, the game is this afternoon.
OK, see you in the gym later.
questions.explanation: 練習を楽しみにしていると言われ、後で体育館でと言うのが自然です。
highlights: I'm looking forward to the practice
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「試合は午後」→練習の話。選択肢2「練習は中止」→やると言った。選択肢3「体育館で会おう」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hey, Mom, may I go to a friend's party tonight? A lot of my classmates will be there.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where is it being held?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's at Tim's house, just a few blocks from here.

choices: All right, but be home by 8 p.m.
Tim's parents are at home now.
questions.explanation: 近所だと聞いて許可し、8時までに帰るよう言うのが自然です。
highlights: just a few blocks from here
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「いいけど8時までに」→正解。選択肢2「早すぎる」→場所の話。選択肢3「ティムの親は家にいる」→関係ない。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hey, it's Linda. How have you been?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Linda. I'm doing well, thanks.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I was thinking it would be great to catch up and have coffee. What about next week?

questions.explanation: 来週コーヒーでもと誘われ、水曜日なら大丈夫と具体的に答えるのが適切です。
highlights: What about next week
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「今朝コーヒー飲んだ」→会う約束。選択肢2「紅茶にする」→日程の話。選択肢3「水曜日なら大丈夫」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello. I hear there's a book sale at the library this week.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, it starts tomorrow and ends Friday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Great. Do you think I can buy some books on local history?

choices: Yes, we have a wide selection of those.
No, the books have all been sold.
questions.explanation: 地元の歴史の本があるか聞かれ、たくさんあると答えるのが適切です。
highlights: books on local history
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「たくさんあります」→正解。選択肢2「持ってきて」→買いたい。選択肢3「全部売り切れ」→明日から。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Excuse me, is this the bus that goes to Main Street?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, it is. We're departing shortly, so get on.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I see, thank you. How much does it cost?

questions.explanation: 料金を聞かれ、2ドルと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: How much does it cost
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「満員」→乗れと言った。選択肢2「2ドル」→正解。選択肢3「終点」→料金を聞いている。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Did you remember to take out the trash today?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, I'm sorry. I'll do it right now.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Actually, let's do it together. There's a lot to carry.

choices: Never mind. I did it yesterday.
questions.explanation: 一緒にやろうと言われ、助かると感謝するのが自然です。
highlights: let's do it together
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「昨日やった」→今日の話。選択肢2「ありがとう、助かる」→正解。選択肢3「明日までに」→今すぐの話。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How did your running event go yesterday, Chris?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not so good, Aya. It was cold and rainy yesterday―not a very fun day for running.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh, that's too bad. At least you got some exercise, though.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's true. Training for the race got me back into shape.

questions.question: Why was the man disappointed?
choices: He did not win the race.
He did not train enough for the event.
The weather was not good at the event.
The race was not long enough for him.
questions.explanation: 寒くて雨のランニングイベントだったので残念でした。
highlights: It was cold and rainy yesterday
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「勝てなかった」→天気の話。選択肢2「練習不足」→体形を取り戻した。選択肢3「天気が悪かった」→正解。選択肢4「距離が短い」→天気の話。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you sign up for Professor Messier's French class yet, Dawn?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Actually, I don't think I'm going to take French anymore.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: But you always do so well in French class. Are you too busy with other classes?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, I want to do something different. I think I'd like to try learning Chinese.

questions.question: Why will the woman probably not take French class next year?
choices: She does not like Professor Messier.
She does not do well in French.
She is too busy with other classes.
She wants to learn another language.
questions.explanation: 違うことをしたい、中国語を学びたいと言っています。
highlights: I want to do something different
I'd like to try learning Chinese
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「先生が嫌い」→違うことをしたい。選択肢2「フランス語が苦手」→成績が良い。選択肢3「他の授業で忙しい」→否定した。選択肢4「別の言語を学びたい」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to the Donner Mountain ranger station. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you tell me which trail goes up Donner Mountain? I've heard the view is great.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Well, the Green Trail goes to the top. However, it's closed today because of repairs. It will reopen next week.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no. Well, I guess I'll have to come back, then.

questions.question: Why is the woman disappointed?
choices: She cannot find her trail map.
She cannot climb Donner Mountain today.
The weather will be poor today.
The Green Trail is too difficult for her.
questions.explanation: 修理のためトレイルが閉鎖されていて、今日は登れません。
highlights: it's closed today because of repairs
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「地図が見つからない」→トレイル閉鎖。選択肢2「今日は登れない」→正解。選択肢3「天気が悪い」→修理のため。選択肢4「難しすぎる」→閉鎖中。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, Cindy turned off the TV while I was playing my video game.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Billy, you've been playing that thing all morning. Let your sister use the TV, too.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: But I was almost finished with the game, Mom. I was on the final level.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's enough video games for a while. Go outside and play with your friends.

questions.question: What is one thing the mother tells the son to do?
choices: Let his sister use the TV.
Tell his sister to come inside.
Go buy some new video games.
questions.explanation: 妹にもテレビを使わせなさいと言っています。
highlights: Let your sister use the TV, too
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「部屋で遊ぶ」→外で遊ぶ。選択肢2「妹にテレビを使わせる」→正解。選択肢3「妹を中に入れる」→テレビの話。選択肢4「新しいゲームを買う」→やめなさい。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Angela. Where are you? You were supposed to meet us at the library to work on our history project.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no. The group project! Sorry, I totally forgot! Can you wait for me? I'll be there in 20 minutes.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK, please hurry. We need your help to make the poster.

questions.question: What do we learn about the girl?
choices: She lost the poster she made for school.
She went to the wrong library.
She finished her history project early.
questions.explanation: 図書館でのグループプロジェクトの約束を完全に忘れていました。
highlights: I totally forgot
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「ポスターをなくした」→忘れていた。選択肢2「約束を忘れた」→正解。選択肢3「間違った図書館」→忘れていた。選択肢4「早く終わった」→これから。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Beth. It's Craig. Listen, I was wondering if I could use your tent this weekend.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure. You can come over and get it this afternoon. Are you going somewhere?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yeah. I'm going camping at Mt. Davis with some friends.

questions.question: What does Craig want to do?
questions.explanation: Bethのテントを借りたいと電話しています。
highlights: I was wondering if I could use your tent
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「テントを借りる」→正解。選択肢2「キャンプに誘う」→テントを借りる。選択肢3「友達の家に行く」→キャンプ。選択肢4「写真を撮る」→キャンプ。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, can I go to the park with my friends Jake and Mia tomorrow?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is your homework done?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, I finished it today during lunch. We want to practice for the upcoming soccer match.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: All right, but be home before dinner. Your grandmother is visiting, and she'll want to see you.

questions.question: What does the boy want to do tomorrow?
questions.explanation: 明日友達と公園に行ってサッカーの練習をしたいと言っています。
highlights: can I go to the park with my friends
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「宿題を終わらせる」→終わった。選択肢2「祖母に電話」→祖母が来る。選択肢3「友達と会う」→正解。選択肢4「サッカーの試合に行く」→練習。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, can you tell me where the library is?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure! It's very close. Just walk two blocks down Center Road, then turn right at the traffic lights. It's next to the post office.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh, the big building with the blue roof?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, that's the library. You should hurry, though. I think it's closing soon.

questions.question: What does the man say about the library?
choices: It is near the post office.
It is too far to walk to.
questions.explanation: 図書館は郵便局の隣にあると言っています。
highlights: It's next to the post office
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「レンガ造り」→言及なし。選択肢2「郵便局の近く」→正解。選択肢3「今日は閉まっている」→もうすぐ閉まる。選択肢4「歩くには遠い」→とても近い。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hey, Tim. It's Becky. Can you help me put away some boxes this weekend? I'm cleaning up my room.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sure. Saturday or Sunday?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sunday is perfect. If you're free later, we could order pizza.

questions.question: Why is the woman calling the man?
choices: To invite him to a pizza party.
To ask for help moving boxes.
questions.explanation: 箱の片付けを手伝ってほしいと電話しています。
highlights: Can you help me put away some boxes
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「学校のプロジェクト」→箱の片付け。選択肢2「ピザパーティー」→手伝いの後のおまけ。選択肢3「週末旅行」→部屋の片付け。選択肢4「箱の片付けの手伝い」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Good afternoon, Sunny Car Rentals.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello! Do you have any cars available for this weekend?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Certainly! We have several options. Would you prefer a small car or a van for larger groups?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: A small car, please. It's just me and my friend. We're planning a trip to the mountains.

questions.question: What will the man do this weekend?
questions.explanation: 友達と車を借りて山にドライブに行く予定です。
highlights: It's just me and my friend
We're planning a trip to the mountains
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「小さい車を買う」→レンタル。選択肢2「自転車」→車で。選択肢3「大人数で旅行」→二人だけ。選択肢4「友達とドライブ」→正解。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Hello, zoo visitors! Don't miss our special animal feeding show at 3 p.m. near the monkey area. At the end of the show, there will be a fun quiz with prizes for kids. And if you're hungry, the snack stand near the lake has delicious food. Remember, the last zoo train back to the entrance leaves at 5 p.m. Enjoy your day!

questions.question: What happens at the end of the animal feeding show?
choices: There is a quiz for children.
There are discounts at the snack stand.
questions.explanation: ショーの最後に子供向けの賞品付きクイズがあります。
highlights: At the end of the show, there will be a fun quiz with prizes for kids
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「子供向けクイズ」→正解。選択肢2「動物園が閉まる」→5時にトレイン。選択肢3「割引」→言及なし。選択肢4「最終トレイン」→5時。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Every Saturday, Anna and her little brother Sam go to the local park. Anna practices with her soccer team. Sam sits under a tree and does his homework. He likes to study outside in the sunshine. After Anna's practice, they both meet their mother at a nearby café. They enjoy eating lunch and chatting about their day.

questions.question: What does Sam do at the park?
choices: He eats lunch with his mom.
questions.explanation: Samは木の下に座って宿題をしています。
highlights: Sam sits under a tree and does his homework
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「サッカーをする」→Annaがする。選択肢2「宿題をする」→正解。選択肢3「友達に会う」→言及なし。選択肢4「母と昼食」→練習後にカフェで。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Attention, swimmers! Our diving event is this Sunday at 11 a.m. Whether you're diving or just watching, it'll be fun! Remember, kids under 12 years old need an adult with them. After the diving, we'll have live music by the pool. Also, anyone interested in signing up for our summer swimming lessons can register at the entrance. Have fun!

questions.question: What can people do at the entrance?
questions.explanation: 入り口で夏の水泳レッスンに登録できます。
highlights: signing up for our summer swimming lessons can register at the entrance
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「ライブ音楽」→プールサイド。選択肢2「ダイビングイベント登録」→水泳レッスン。選択肢3「水泳レッスンに申し込む」→正解。選択肢4「ダイビングスーツ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Every month, Leo helps his grandkids, Emma and Ben, with their bicycles. They clean the bikes, fill the tires with air, and make sure everything works well. Leo tells stories about going on bicycle rides in the mountains when he was young. Afterward, they all take a short bike ride around their town. Sometimes, they stop for ice cream.

questions.question: Where did Leo ride his bicycle when he was young?
questions.explanation: Leoは若い頃、山で自転車に乗っていたと話しています。
highlights: bicycle rides in the mountains when he was young
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「アイスクリーム屋」→今の話。選択肢2「山で」→正解。選択肢3「孫の家」→言及なし。選択肢4「別の町」→山。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: The Faroe Islands are between Iceland and Norway. The people there have an interesting way to make maps of their land. They use sheep with cameras! These sheep walk around, and the cameras take pictures. This project was started because the islands were not very detailed on online maps. It's a fun way to learn more about the islands.

questions.question: Why do people in the Faroe Islands put cameras on sheep?
choices: To learn more about the sheep.
To protect the sheep from danger.
questions.explanation: オンラインマップに詳細がなかったため、羊にカメラをつけて地図を作っています。
highlights: an interesting way to make maps
the islands were not very detailed on online maps
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「地図作りのため」→正解。選択肢2「羊について学ぶ」→地図作り。選択肢3「観光客用の写真」→地図作り。選択肢4「羊を守る」→地図作り。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Attention, shoppers! Welcome to our monthly farmers market! Fresh fruits, vegetables, and homemade jams are available at great prices. Looking for a snack? Try Ms. Miller's apple pies. If you purchase three items anywhere in the market, you get a free eco-friendly bag! We're open until 4 p.m. Thank you for supporting local farmers!

questions.question: How can someone get a free eco-friendly bag?
questions.explanation: マーケットで3つ買うと無料のエコバッグがもらえます。
highlights: If you purchase three items anywhere in the market, you get a free eco-friendly bag
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「3つ買う」→正解。選択肢2「ミラーさんの店に行く」→3つ買う。選択肢3「ジャムを買う」→3つ買う。選択肢4「4時まで」→3つ買う。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Every weekend, Carlos and his mother visit the library. Carlos loves to read about nature. Sometimes, he goes to kids' storytelling events while his mother joins the library book club. Each time Carlos and his mother visit, they each choose a new book. During their last visit, Carlos got one about jungle plants, and his mother found a novel by her favorite author.

questions.question: What did Carlos do during his last visit to the library?
questions.explanation: 前回の訪問でジャングルの植物についての本を借りました。
highlights: Carlos got one about jungle plants
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「本を借りた」→正解。選択肢2「ブッククラブ」→母。選択肢3「好きな作家に会った」→母の本。選択肢4「動物について読む」→植物。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Attention all passengers at Skyview Airport. Due to stormy weather conditions, some flights may experience minor delays. If you're traveling today, please check the screens for new information about your flight. The café and restaurants on the second floor are offering special discounts on meals and drinks during the wait. Thank you for your patience.

questions.question: Why should people check the screens?
choices: To get updates on flight times.
To find a list of restaurants.
questions.explanation: フライトの新しい情報を確認するためにスクリーンを見てください。
highlights: please check the screens for new information about your flight
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「天気予報」→フライト情報。選択肢2「割引情報」→フライト情報。選択肢3「フライト時刻の更新」→正解。選択肢4「レストランリスト」→フライト情報。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Sophie and Alex had to take photos of trees and research them for a school project. Sophie planned to take the photos while Alex did the research. But the day they planned to start, Sophie's camera broke. Alex tried to borrow one from his sister, but she was using it. Finally, their teacher lent them his camera. Thankfully, they finished the project.

questions.question: How did the teacher help Sophie and Alex?
choices: He let them use his camera.
He gave them pictures of trees.
He helped them research the trees.
questions.explanation: 先生が自分のカメラを貸してくれました。
highlights: their teacher lent them his camera
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「カメラを修理」→貸した。選択肢2「カメラを貸した」→正解。選択肢3「写真をくれた」→カメラを貸した。選択肢4「調査を手伝った」→カメラ。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Korfball is a team sport from the Netherlands that is now played all over the world. It is special because both men and women play together on the same team. In the game, players try to toss a ball into a basket. But the basket is so high that players can't reach it by jumping. Good teamwork is the key to getting points.

questions.question: What is special about this sport?
choices: Men and women play on the same team.
Players must jump high to score.
It is played mainly in the Netherlands.
The basket is near the ground.
questions.explanation: 男女が同じチームで一緒にプレーする特別なスポーツです。
highlights: both men and women play together on the same team
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「男女同じチーム」→正解。選択肢2「高くジャンプ」→届かない。選択肢3「オランダだけ」→世界中。選択肢4「バスケットが地面近く」→高い。
